title: How do I update my personal email address and cell phone number in the Student Hub?
plain_text: Students can add or update their personal email addresses and cell phone numbers on the Student Hub to communicate with Northeastern University in the event of an emergency or when they lose access to their Northeastern accounts. Update personal email address and cell phone number. 1. Log in to Student Hub. 2. Navigate to Resources > Miscellaneous and select 'NU Alerts & Emergency Contacts Form'. 3. Select 'Emergency Contacts' from the list on the left. 4. Update your personal email address and cell phone number and select Submit.
body_html:
Students can add or update their personal email addresses and cell phone numbers on the Student Hub to communicate with Northeastern University in the event of an emergency or when they lose access to their Northeastern accounts.

Update personal email address and cell phone number

  • Log in to Student Hub.
  • Navigate to Resources > Miscellaneous and select 'NU Alerts & Emergency Contacts Form'.
  • Select 'Emergency Contacts' from the list on the left.
  • Update your personal email address and cell phone number and select Submit.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Students can add or update their personal email addresses and cell phone numbers on the Student Hub to communicate with Northeastern University in the event of an emergency or when they lose access to their Northeastern accounts.

sections.heading: Update personal email address and cell phone number
sections.text: Log in to Student Hub. Navigate to Resources > Miscellaneous and select 'NU Alerts & Emergency Contacts Form'. Select 'Emergency Contacts' from the list on the left. Update your personal email address and cell phone number and select Submit.
steps: Navigate to Resources > Miscellaneous and select 'NU Alerts & Emergency Contacts Form'.
Select 'Emergency Contacts' from the list on the left.
Update your personal email address and cell phone number and select Submit.
